project: No More Mosquitoes — Navigation Fix Plan

files_likely_to_change.reason: Add customer hamburger branch; fix end props on NavLinks; import from navigation.ts
Fix end props on sidebar NavLinks from end={item.to === '/dashboard'} to end={true} for all leaf routes
New file — canonical nav config source for all roles
May need new translation keys for customer nav labels if not already present

nav_configs_to_unify.strategy: Extract NAV_LINKS and ADMIN_NAV_LINKS from SiteHeader into navigation.ts. Add CUSTOMER_NAV_LINKS and UNIVERSAL_NAV_LINKS. Import everywhere needed.

priority_cta.label: Customer Dashboard
priority_cta.note: end=false so it stays highlighted across all /dashboard/* routes

rules.reason: Every path starts with /, so exact match is required
Intentionally stays highlighted across all child routes
Leaf routes must not bleed active state to sibling paths
Admin routes may have sub-routes with IDs (/admin/customers/123); prefix match is correct

active_matching_rules.current_bug: end prop only set to true for '/' in hamburger and '/dashboard' in sidebar — all other links use startsWith default, causing multi-highlight
active_matching_rules.fix: Set end={true} on all dashboard leaf NavLinks in both hamburger and sidebar

hamburger_branch_logic.current: admin ? ADMIN_NAV_LINKS : navLinks (guests + customers share navLinks)

proposed.pseudocode: if (isAdmin) → ADMIN_NAV_LINKS + UNIVERSAL; else if (isCustomer) → CUSTOMER_NAV_LINKS + UNIVERSAL; else → GUEST_NAV_LINKS
proposed.undefined_role_fallback: Treat undefined/null userRole as guest to prevent flicker showing wrong menu while profile loads

implementation_steps.title: Create client/data/navigation.ts
actions: Define CUSTOMER_HAMBURGER_NAV array (priority CTA + 10 dashboard links + 5 universal links)
Define ADMIN_HAMBURGER_NAV array (priority CTA + 17 admin links + 4 universal links)

implementation_steps.title: Update SiteHeader.tsx hamburger branch
actions: Remove inline NAV_LINKS and ADMIN_NAV_LINKS definitions
Replace binary branch with three-way branch (admin / customer / guest)
Add end={true} to leaf route NavLinks in hamburger
Keep end={false} on Dashboard/Admin CTA links only
Remove navLinks transformation memo (no longer needed)

implementation_steps.title: Fix DashboardLayout.tsx sidebar end props
actions: Change end={item.to === '/dashboard'} to end={true} for all leaf route NavLinks
Add end={false} only to the Dashboard Overview CTA if it serves as a section root

implementation_steps.title: Add missing translation keys if needed
actions: Add any missing keys with English defaults

validation_checklist.expected: Hamburger shows guest links; Pricing is highlighted; no other item is highlighted

Hamburger shows Customer Dashboard CTA + 10 dashboard links + Universal links; Appointments is highlighted in hamburger; only Appointments is highlighted in sidebar; Dashboard CTA may also be highlighted (by design)
Hamburger shows Customer Dashboard CTA highlighted; Overview highlighted in sidebar; no public links visible in hamburger
Hamburger shows Universal links including FAQ; FAQ is highlighted; Dashboard CTA is NOT highlighted; no public sales links visible
Hamburger shows Admin Dashboard CTA + admin links; Customers link is highlighted; no customer dashboard links visible
Hamburger reverts to guest nav immediately; no dashboard links visible

validation_checklist.scenario: Profile load is slow (userRole undefined briefly)
validation_checklist.expected: Hamburger shows guest nav until role resolves; no flash of wrong menu; no console errors
Only Plan & Billing is highlighted; no other item is highlighted; Dashboard CTA may be highlighted (by design)

regression_risks.risk: Customer sees no access to public pages
regression_risks.mitigation: Ensure Universal links (Our Story, Reviews, FAQ, Blog, Contact) are included in CUSTOMER_HAMBURGER_NAV

regression_risks.risk: Role undefined during auth hydration causes flicker
regression_risks.mitigation: Default undefined/null userRole to guest view; do not show customer or admin menu until userRole is confirmed

regression_risks.risk: Admin hamburger breaks from SiteHeader refactor
regression_risks.mitigation: Admin branch stays isolated; only adding a new customer branch; test admin login explicitly

regression_risks.risk: Translation keys missing for new customer nav
regression_risks.mitigation: Add English fallbacks for all new nav labels; check translations.ts before deploying
Desktop nav is rendered separately from mobile hamburger in SiteHeader; verify desktop nav unchanged in final diff
